title: Treatment of Scabies
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Scabies treatment uses clinician-prescribed scabicide medicine.
Patients should follow medication instructions exactly, including how long to leave medicine on before washing it off.
Household or close-contact steps may be needed to prevent spread.
No non-prescription products have been tested and approved to treat human scabies.
